background.treatment: shadowed/dark to contrast with sunlit subject
background.objects_catalog: Mary Kay Satin Hands lotion tube, white button-down shirt

atmosphere: thin smoke wisps rising from the cigarette
subtle heat shimmer near the flame (very light)

lighting.highlights: natural highlights on nose bridge and lips, not glossy-plastic
lighting.shadows: soft shadows under nose and jaw, realistic falloff

hair.styling_detail: Hair is highlighted blonde (balayage) with darker roots, styled in soft loose waves catching the sunlight
hair.details: Sunlight creates a halo effect on the blonde strands

hands_and_gestures.finger_positions: Right hand: squeezing tube with thumb and fingers; Left hand: cupped gently to receive lotion
hands_and_gestures.details: Nails are long, almond-shaped with nude polish and abstract black line art

composition.framing: subject centered, hands visible in lower foreground
composition.camera_angle: slightly above eye level, mild downward tilt
composition.depth_of_field: shallow, subject tack sharp, background strongly blurred

prompts: Sun-drenched lifestyle portrait of a blonde woman with balayage hair wearing a loose white button-down shirt, applying hand cream from a sage green tube onto her palm, long manicured nails with abstract art, hard direct sunlight creating high contrast shadows on shirt and face, golden hour lighting, dark background, peaceful expression looking down
Golden hour beauty shot, woman dispensing lotion, Mary Kay Satin Hands tube, white shirt, strong sun rays, hard shadows, warm color temperature, candid moment, aesthetic nail art
generation_parameters.technical_settings: Smartphone camera or DSLR, f/4.0 aperture, low ISO, fast shutter speed to handle bright sun
generation_parameters.post_processing: Warmth enhancement, contrast boost, shadow deepening
